SUMMER TRAVEL INCLUDED
2X points on flights

Earn double Rapid Rewards® points when you register and book by 6/15/26 and fly by 11/18/26.*

*Terms apply.

Register now
Travel Tips
We’ll treat your bags like our own

You can have one carry-on and one personal item. See if your airport features Express Bag Drop.

Meet your new travel buddy

Manage flights from your phone or tablet with our apps. You can change or cancel reservations, view your flight's status, access your mobile boarding pass, and more.

Check in like a pro

You can check in online and print your boarding pass up to 24 hours in advance, or stop by our convenient airport kiosks.

Speed through security

Priority Lanes and Express Lanes, (where available), are designed to speed our Choice Extra and Choice Preferred Customers, as well as A-List and A-List Preferred Members, through check-in and security lines.

Join Rapid Rewards®. Get rewarded rapidly.
Redeem points for domestic and international flights
Also redeem points on hotels, cars & more
No blackout dates & points don’t expire
Free inflight WiFi* for Rapid Rewards® Members thanks to
T-Mobile
Join for free

*Where available. Available only on WiFi-enabled designated aircraft.
All Rapid Rewards® rules and regulations apply and can be found at Southwest.com/rrterms.

Find the fare that works for you

At Southwest®, we offer four fares to get you more out of every flight: Choice Extra, Choice Preferred, Choice, and Basic. Find the fare that works for you.

 

See all my benefits
I have an Unaccompanied Minor

It's never too early for your first flight, but children ages 5-11 traveling without a passenger age 12 or older are considered Unaccompanied Minors and require a different protocol.

 

Find out more
I’m flying with an infant or child

When flying with little ones, it’s always best to be prepared. Get documentation, safety requirements, and information on what you need to know before and during your flight.

 

Get ready
Special accommodations
View Help Center
I have a disability

We're here to assist you, whether it's help with a wheelchair, an assistance animal, or any health concerns you may have. Just click "Add Disability Options" when you book.

Learn more
